comment: Measured purge volume per directional filament-id pair (From 'from' To 'to'). Direction matters: From A To B may differ from From B To A. 'from'/'to' use filament_id codes (e.g. GFA00 = PLA Basic, GFG00 = PETG Basic, GFB00 = ABS, GFN08 = PA6-GF, GFB01 = ASA, GFN04 = PAHT-CF). The final purge shown in the flush matrix is max(measured_purge, predicted_purge). Update this file to refine values without recompiling.
